issues.description: Second effect has trigger 'Trigger' with no associated condition. This is incomplete and ambiguous. A proper trigger event must be specified (e.g., OnPlay, OnAttack, OnKO, etc.) or this effect should be removed if it does not belong to this card.

DrawCard action appears without justification in the card text. The official text only describes a K.O. effect with no mention of drawing cards. This effect should be removed unless it reflects additional card mechanics not shown in the provided text.
